description: Deferred from bl-be5f. Spec bl-2e26 §12/§4: config/balls.toml scalar/list VALUES layer DOWN the trail at READ time, innermost(landing)-wins, no depth cap (tasks do NOT federate; exactly one store at the terminus). No config module / EffectiveConfig exists in the greenfield rewrite yet, and nothing consumes config values today (branch name is hardcoded 'balls'), so building the layering now would be a consumer-less mechanism. The trail walk landed in bl-be5f produces the ordered local-checkout sequence this would read config from.
title: Config VALUES trail-layering (§4 EffectiveConfig down the trail)
